setup.title: Before you begin...
setup.description: You'll need to decide whether to setup a $t(app.manifold) reading group for this course. If you choose a reading group, $t(app.manifold) can automatically add permissions for students in the course to view any protected resources that you link. You can also use $t(app.manifold) reading group features, like annotation, for the course. If you're only using $t(app.manifold) for source materials and would prefer not to have a course group visible in $t(app.manifold), select links only.
